creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
Clicking the help button in the "Flight simulator" (available in the last port update) dialog won't have any effect (while should display the list of control keys). What I see in console is that looks like it's missing linuxish freetype2:

$ googleearth
wx=0.312690, wy=0.328990, rx=0.639990, ry=0.330000
..
gx=0.210000, gy=0.710000, bx=0.149990, by=0.059990
/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libfreetype.so.6" not found, required by "libqt-mt.so.3"
/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libfreetype.so.6" not found, required by "libqt-mt.so.3"

How-To-Repeat: Activate googleearch flight simulator (echo 1 > .googleearth/Registry/google/googleearthplus/User/flightsim/isenabled). Update the googleearch from ports and run. Select the Flight simulator from Tools menu, click Help in the dialog opened (to understand how to control the plain), see nothing showing up, become upset.
